analysis.summary: Your resume scores 86/100. Good foundation with room for improvement.

contact_info.feedback: Complete contact details help recruiters reach you quickly.

professional_summary.feedback: A strong summary hooks recruiters in 6 seconds.

experience.feedback: Use STAR format: Situation, Task, Action, Result.

skills.feedback: Group skills by category for easy scanning.

formatting.feedback: Consistent formatting improves readability and ATS parsing.

analysis.ats_feedback: Avoid tables and images. Use standard section headings. Save as .docx or .pdf.
